reviews.review_description: I NEED THE SOUND TRACK FOR THE DEMO THE SONGS ARE SO BEAUTIFUL!!!!!!

The game is simple, magnetize the items into your ship's garbage disposal and collect money by doing so.

The flick function never worked for me honestly, as another reviewed wrote. I tried to flick and rotate the steel crates and all they did was fling past me, hit the edge of the ship, then go off into space. I did also have one steel crate glitch and just stuck to the border of the ship entrance and rattle annoyingly for the rest of the time limit. No matter what I did to grab or move it, wouldn't budge and just sat and rattled. 

But a super simple and fun game honestly and I enjoyed this demo!

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the great review and for the feedback.  I do plan to improve the usability of the magnet-flick action in a future version.  I'm glad you enjoyed playing Space Junk.

reviews.review_description:
Simple concept, executed well. I was right on the edge about buying the additional levels for $2 after finishing the free demo.

For me, there were a few minor things that kept me from pulling the trigger on a purchase:
1) The "flick" action for the magne-gun felt pretty unresponsive, even with two hands. It wasn't clear if it's intended to be that way or I was doing it wrong. Some sort of visual demonstration would have really helped there.
2) The semi-automatic guns required way too many trigger presses in a short time. My index finger started cramping by the end of even the shorter levels. The full-auto guns worked great, and I wish all guns had that enabled.
3) It was a bit unclear where on the sides were the "sweet spots" that pulled items into the bay. Some sort of vague visual indicator showing how far up to my sides the traction enabled would have made it a lot easier to tell where I needed to aim junk.

Bravo to the developer on this one though! The aiming and physics felt solid.

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for taking the time to give such a detailed review.  This is great feedback and I'll definitely try to improve on these points in future versions. Thanks for the support - I'm glad you enjoyed playing Space Junk.

reviews.review_description:
As a free game this is worth getting. Simple but fun. The sound FX could be meatier though, as they're a bit weak.

Worth a look while free.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the review. Much appreciated. I'm glad you enjoyed playing.

reviews.review_title: Controls need a huge revamp but fun!
reviews.review_description: The shooting is alright. The guns all feel the same and mainly do the exact same. The gravity is where the game is really lacking. Overall a fun experience

developer_response.body: Thank you very much for the review.  I was also thinking a few of the guns were a bit similar, so this is very helpful feedback.  Maybe I should remove some.  I'm glad you had fun playing.

reviews.review_description: This was my first VR game experience and I really enjoyed it! I loved the vending machine in space :)

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review.  I'm really pleased you enjoyed playing Space Junk and its nice to hear that your first VR experience was a good one.
